title: Services | Synnergy Lab
description: Strategic diagnosis, marketing strategy, implementation, and optimization services for small businesses.
heading: Strategic marketing services
intro: Our work covers diagnosis, strategy, implementation, and measurement so marketing stops being improvised and starts supporting growth.

sections.title: Strategic diagnosis
sections.body: We review the business, market, positioning, channels, and opportunities before proposing actions.

sections.title: Marketing strategy
sections.body: We define value proposition, audiences, channels, goals, and funnel logic with clear priorities.

sections.title: Implementation and optimization
sections.body: We execute aligned actions and improve them using relevant metrics and strategic reading.
